objective: Plan hosted participant leases, resource offers, frontier claims, attempts, findings, challenges, authenticated time, and exact participant-to-result closeout.
falsifiable_claim: Expired or revoked participants and claims cannot admit results or effects, while accepted paths bind the exact participant, claim, predecessor, root, and authenticated time.
exit_criteria: TTL, heartbeat, renew, release, revoke, backpressure, and required reassignment cases close.
Each admitted result binds exact participant, claim, predecessor, and root; every revoked or expired path reaches zero unauthorized effect or admission.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M5_PARTICIPANT_FRONTIER_RESULT_CLOSEOUT_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Exercise lease expiry, stale heartbeat, renew/release race, revoked participant, claim reassignment, duplicate attempt, predecessor swap, root swap, forged time, and backpressure bypass.
remaining_nonclaims: Acceptance, verdict, settlement, federation, and stage closure remain separate owner concerns.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
